messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] (no subject)
messages.body_plain:
Dear All,



We welcome you to join IBS KENYA SUSAN 2021 conference that will be held
from 6-9 September 2021 in Nairobi, Kenya.



The Sub-Saharan Africa Network (SUSAN) of the International Biometrics
Society is a network of national biometric groups of the Sub-Saharan Africa
countries that promotes the advancement of life sciences through
development, application and dissemination of effective mathematical and
statistical methods to its members and collaborating partners. See URL:
https://www.biometricsociety.org/about/regions-networks/susan-network



The conference will be hosted by the School of Mathematics, at the
University of Nairobi under the theme: ?*Biometry in the era of Big Data
for Health and Food Security.?* We have already made significant progress
in planning for this concert, despite the challenges posed by the SARS-COV2
pandemic, with all our invited keynote and plenary speakers confirming
their participation.



In view of the COVID19 we are considering either a fully virtual or a
hybrid conference. In order to facilitate our planning, we greatly
appreciate your response in the link below



https://is.gd/susan2021

Best regards,

Elias Obudho,

IBS Kenya Secretary.
*For I know the plans I have for you,? declares the Lord , ?plans to
prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.*

-- 
-----------------------------------------
A KEBS 9001:2015 Certified 
Organization, No. KEBS/QMS/RF:064 Rev. 03



	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
